approaches.rationale: jemalloc is a self-contained autotools project bundled under deps/; wrapping its configure/make build with rules_foreign_cc gives a hermetic, buildable slice without hand-authoring its complex generated-header build graph.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "redis",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_foreign_cc", version = "0.15.1")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

cc_configure = use_extension("@rules_cc//cc:extensions.bzl", "cc_configure_extension")
use_repo(cc_configure, "local_config_cc")
approaches.root_build:
load("@rules_foreign_cc//foreign_cc:defs.bzl", "configure_make")

filegroup(
    name = "jemalloc_srcs",
    srcs = glob(
        ["deps/jemalloc/**"],
        exclude = ["deps/jemalloc/test/**", "deps/jemalloc/msvc/**"],
    ),
)

configure_make(
    name = "jemalloc",
    lib_source = ":jemalloc_srcs",
    configure_in_place = True,
    configure_options = [
        "--with-jemalloc-prefix=je_",
        "--enable-cc-silence",
    ],
    out_static_libs = ["libjemalloc.a"],
    targets = ["build_lib_static", "install_lib_static", "install_include"],
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)
anticipated_risks: autogen.sh may be required before configure

approaches.rationale: hiredis ships a CMakeLists.txt and is a small self-contained C client library bundled in deps/; wrapping it with the cmake rule yields a clean buildable static-lib target.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "redis_hiredis",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_foreign_cc", version = "0.15.1")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

cc_configure = use_extension("@rules_cc//cc:extensions.bzl", "cc_configure_extension")
use_repo(cc_configure, "local_config_cc")
approaches.root_build:
load("@rules_foreign_cc//foreign_cc:defs.bzl", "cmake")

filegroup(
    name = "hiredis_srcs",
    srcs = glob(
        ["deps/hiredis/**"],
        exclude = ["deps/hiredis/examples/**", "deps/hiredis/fuzzing/**"],
    ),
)

cmake(
    name = "hiredis",
    lib_source = ":hiredis_srcs",
    working_directory = "deps/hiredis",
    cache_entries = {
        "DISABLE_TESTS": "ON",
        "ENABLE_SSL": "OFF",
    },
    out_static_libs = ["libhiredis.a"],
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)
anticipated_risks: CMake working_directory path resolution under filegroup

approaches.rationale: hiredis is a small, flat C library with simple #include structure, a good candidate for the gazelle_cc plugin to generate fine-grained cc_library targets as a true source-native port.
approaches.module_bazel:
module(
    name = "redis_hiredis_cc",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle_cc", version = "0.6.0")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_go", version = "0.61.1")

go_sdk = use_extension("@rules_go//go:extensions.bzl", "go_sdk")
go_sdk.download(version = "1.25.4")

cc_configure = use_extension("@rules_cc//cc:extensions.bzl", "cc_configure_extension")
use_repo(cc_configure, "local_config_cc")
approaches.root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")
load("@gazelle_cc//:def.bzl", "GAZELLE_CC_LANGUAGES")

# gazelle:exclude deps/jemalloc
# gazelle:exclude deps/fpconv
# gazelle:exclude deps/hdr_histogram
# gazelle:exclude deps/hiredis/examples
# gazelle:exclude deps/hiredis/fuzzing
# gazelle:exclude deps/hiredis/test.c
# gazelle:exclude src

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = "@gazelle_cc//:gazelle_cc",
)
anticipated_risks: generated config not present (sockcompat/ssl platform conditionals)
SSL sources require OpenSSL not auto-resolved
